title: Gold Trial Chambers
description: Makes the Mace, Wind charge, Breeze and wind particles turn into Gold! (Midas touch!) [2D]
body:
# Welcome to Golden Trial Chambers!
All of the new items/entities/blocks have been turned into gold like Midases touch!
And makes them glow in dark! Wind particles too!

### Overview
![1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/159806d935dd7015882358ef8108aa339f89ef33.png)

### Midas Breeze!
![Midas Breeze](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9f3d09bffec32c26f7a6938134d85d0755ee35d6.png)

### Golden Wind Particles!
![Golden Particles](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/76f1bcdabc4923d8bdfe37c51d3c6459abdf3e0a.png)

### Golden Projectile!
![Golden Wind Charge Projectile!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b91bc8c8f52e4220ebb6e9f01bd513c713cd2b9d.png)

## Emissive properties
Some emissive properties aren't working the way it's expected. But they do work for some of them!
![Emissive properties](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d2608717c0ce860677d749a71ed1355a0e0b3491.png)
